<!--
  Describe the main biological questions for this case study.
  What will our analysis aim to answer? There can be more than 2.
  Fill them in within the inner_block section, but leave the custom box syntax
  See this previous case study as an example: 
  https://www.opencasestudies.org/ocs-bp-co2-emissions/#Main_Questions
-->

# **Main Question**

***

This case study investigates whether 
{{< glossary "methylation profile" display="DNA methylation profiles" >}} can 
be used to accurately predict {{< glossary "chronological age" >}} across 
independent studies and populations using both classical and 
{{< glossary "deep learning" >}} approaches. This case study investigates the 
following research questions:

::::{.main_question}

:::{.main_question_header}

Our main question(s)

:::

:::{.inner_block}

1. Can a {{< glossary "neural network" display="neural network-based" >}} 
   {{< glossary "epigenetic clock" >}} accurately predict 
   {{< glossary "chronological age" >}} from publicly-available 
   {{< glossary "DNA methylation" display="DNA methylation data" >}}?

2. How does a {{< glossary "deep learning" display="deep learning-based" >}} 
   {{< glossary "epigenetic clock" >}} compare to a more traditional, 
   {{< glossary "elastic net regression" display="elastic net-based" >}} clock 
   when trained on the same, {{< glossary harmonization display="harmonized" >}} 
   data?

3. What practical challenges arise when applying 
   {{< glossary "deep learning" >}} models to 
   {{< glossary "high-dimensional data" >}}, and how can these challenges be 
   addressed in a reproducible R workflow?

:::

::::

***
